creator: tmclaugh@FreeBSD.org
text:
Attached is a diff against the original .shar incorporating Phillip's
changes and some of my own.  Can I get the okay to commit this version?
It tindebroxes fine except gconf cores during the install.  I still need
to find the cause of that problem.  Thanks.

tom

Changes:
- update to 0.12.1
- Added some dependencies
- Correctly install gconf schemas
- Corrected plugin names
- Corrected location of share/ data
- Added OPTIONS for faad, flac, and vorbis (These are actually detected
at runtime)
- install monodoc files
